title: T-047 — HACCP schema (haccp_plans + haccp_ccps + haccp_monitoring_records) + RLS (09-e-01)
prompt:
# T-047 — HACCP schema + RLS

PRD: §6.3 haccp_plans/haccp_ccps/haccp_monitoring_records DDL, §9.1 RLS, §11.5 V-QA-HACCP/V-QA-CCP
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 3 HACCP physical tables (plans + ccps + monitoring records) with within_limits GENERATED column, retention 5y, indexes, RLS (function-form), and Drizzle schemas. Foundation for the 09-e sub-module.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 0140 emits haccp_plans (id, plan_code, product_family, product_id, version, status CHECK, effective_from, reviewed_at, approved_by, approved_at, UNIQUE(org_id, plan_code, version)).
2. haccp_ccps (id, plan_id FK, ccp_code, step_name, hazard_type CHECK in {biological,chemical,physical,allergen}, critical_limit_min/max, unit, monitoring_frequency, monitoring_method, deviation_threshold_seconds, corrective_action_default, verification_method, record_method, active, sort_order, UNIQUE(org_id, plan_id, ccp_code)).
3. haccp_monitoring_records (id, ccp_id FK, wo_id?, lp_id?, measured_value, measured_text, within_limits GENERATED ALWAYS AS (subselect against ccp limits per §6.3), recorded_by, recorded_at, recorded_via CHECK in {desktop,scanner,iot_sensor}, signature_hash, retention_until 5y GENERATED, deviation_id FK→haccp_deviations P2).
4. Indexes: idx_haccp_mon_ccp(org_id, ccp_id, recorded_at DESC); idx_haccp_mon_violations(org_id, recorded_at DESC) WHERE within_limits=false.
5. RLS: ENABLE RLS on all 3 tables; CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation USING (org_id = app.current_org_id()) WITH CHECK (org_id = app.current_org_id()) — function form per Wave0 v4.3.
6. Drizzle schemas: packages/db/src/schema/haccpPlans.ts, haccpCcps.ts, haccpMonitoringRecords.ts; export from index.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0140_haccp_tables.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/haccpPlans.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/haccpCcps.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/haccpMonitoringRecords.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/haccp-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0140 applied, when \d on all 3 tables runs, then all §6.3 columns exist (within_limits GENERATED ALWAYS AS via subselect on haccp_ccps; hazard_type CHECK 4 values; retention_until 5y GENERATED) and RLS is enabled on all 3 tables with function-form policy
2. Given a haccp_ccp with critical_limit_min=4.0 critical_limit_max=10.0, when monitoring_records insert with measured_value=15.0 AND 3.0, then within_limits is false in both cases; with measured_value=7.0 then within_limits is true
3. Given two tenants with app.current_org_id() each, when each inserts haccp_plans/ccps/monitoring rows and SELECTs, then each sees only its own rows (function-form RLS, not GUC)
4. Given the partial index idx_haccp_mon_violations, when SELECT * FROM haccp_monitoring_records WHERE within_limits=false ORDER BY recorded_at DESC runs, then the EXPLAIN plan shows the partial index is used

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: packages/db/__tests__/haccp-schema.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs (column introspection, GENERATED within_limits compute, RLS function-form isolation, partial index usage) before migration
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test haccp-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not use GUC reads — use app.current_org_id() function (Wave0 v4.3; audit B 4.2)
- Do not deviate from §6.3 verbatim DDL (consumer T-051 depends on column names)
- Do not skip the GENERATED within_limits subselect (server-side limit check must be DB-level not app-level)
- Do not skip the partial idx_haccp_mon_violations index (audit / KPI queries depend on it)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create haccp_plans + haccp_ccps + haccp_monitoring_records tables (within_limits GENERATED, 5y retention, partial index for violations, function-form RLS) with Drizzle schemas.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0140 emits all 3 tables per §6.3 verbatim DDL including within_limits as GENERATED ALWAYS AS subselect on haccp_ccps (validates measured_value within [critical_limit_min, critical_limit_max]), retention_until 5y GENERATED, hazard_type CHECK in {biological,chemical,physical,allergen}, recorded_via CHECK in {desktop,scanner,iot_sensor}, deviation_threshold_seconds for ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 rule. Indexes: idx_haccp_mon_ccp(org_id, ccp_id, recorded_at DESC), idx_haccp_mon_violations partial WHERE within_limits=false. RLS function-form policy per Wave0 v4.3. Drizzle ORM schemas with Insert/Select types. PRD anchors verified: §6.3 source DDL; §9.1 RLS pattern (apply via app.current_org_id() function not GUC); §11.5 V-QA-HACCP/V-QA-CCP validations the schema enables.
out_of_scope: Do not implement HACCP CRUD APIs (T-051)
Do not register DSL rule ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 (T-052)
Do not implement haccp_deviations P2 table (Epic 8I)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0140 applied, when \d on all 3 tables runs, then all §6.3 columns exist (within_limits GENERATED; hazard_type CHECK 4 values; retention_until 5y GENERATED) and RLS is enabled with function-form policy on all 3
Given haccp_ccp with limits [4.0..10.0], when monitoring_records insert measured_value=15.0 and 3.0, then within_limits is false; insert 7.0, then within_limits is true
Given two tenants with app.current_org_id() each, when each inserts and SELECTs HACCP rows, then each sees only its own (function-form RLS isolation)
Given the partial idx_haccp_mon_violations index, when EXPLAIN ANALYZE the violations query runs, then the partial index is selected (assert via QUERY PLAN string match)
test_strategy: RED: packages/db/__tests__/haccp-schema.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before migration
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test haccp-schema'

Do not deviate from §6.3 verbatim DDL
Do not skip the GENERATED within_limits subselect
Do not skip the partial idx_haccp_mon_violations (audit + KPI queries)
